ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

document_quality_assessment.quality_notes: Both documents are text-based PDFs with clear, readable content. No OCR issues detected.

certificate.classification_notes: EU Certificate of Origin issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, ICC accredited. Certificate number SEG-23D-788008. Clearly identified as ORIGINAL (1/1).

invoice.classification_notes: 5-page commercial invoice from SKF Eurotrade AB. Invoice number RB6604864, dated 2023-03-08. Contains item details, weights, custom declarations, and certificate of guarantee.

document_pairing.pairing_notes: Certificate consignor 'SKF Eurotrade AB' matches invoice issuer 'SKF Eurotrade AB'. However, certificate references invoice RB6604204 while the attached invoice is RB6604864 — these are DIFFERENT invoice numbers. Pairing validated via consignor match but invoice number discrepancy is critical.
document_pairing.sanity_check_details: Criterion 2 met: Certificate consignor 'SKF Eurotrade AB' is identified as the invoice issuer. Criterion 1 FAILED: Certificate references invoice RB6604204, but invoice bears number RB6604864. Criterion 3 NOT met: Certificate consignee 'Technotorg-Don LLC' is NOT found in the invoice (invoice buyer is 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC'). Sanity check passes on criterion 2 alone, but the invoice number and consignee mismatches are critical findings.

lc_check.lc_verification_notes: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate.

Invoice page 1: footer 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden, SWEDEN'

Invoice page 3: footer 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB'
Invoice page 4: footer 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB'
Invoice page 5: footer 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB'
Invoice page 5: 'SKF EUROTRADE AB' in quality certificate text
consignor_search.search_notes: Consignor name 'SKF Eurotrade AB' found extensively throughout the invoice as the issuing entity.

consignor.invoice_value: SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Consignor name 'SKF Eurotrade AB' is found explicitly in the invoice header on page 1 as the invoice issuer, and in the footer on all pages as 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB'. Direct match.
Certificate consignor country: Sweden. Invoice issuer country: SWEDEN (header), confirmed by VAT no SE556206761001 (SE prefix = Sweden) and IBAN SE90... (SE prefix = Sweden). Land matches.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Land verification via indirect identifiers – VAT prefix SE and IBAN prefix SE confirm Sweden

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice issuer (header): 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden, SWEDEN'. Company name 'SKF Eurotrade AB' is identical after normalization. Address: '415 50, GÖTEBORG' vs '415 50 Goteborg' — minor variation (Göteborg/Goteborg). Country: Sweden in both, confirmed via explicit text and VAT prefix SE. MATCH per rule 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.
consignor.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'SKF Eurotrade AB' med adress '415 50, GÖTEBORG, Sweden' identifieras direkt som fakturautställare 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden, SWEDEN'. Företagsnamn och land överensstämmer exakt.

consignee.certificate_value: Technotorg-Don LLC, Heroiv Ukrainy avenue, 113/1, 54025 Mykolaiv, UKRAINE
consignee.invoice_value: Bill to: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN; Sold to: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, KYRGYZSTAN; Ship to: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, KYRGYZSTAN

comparison_steps.description: Priority order for consignee identification – check primary billing fields first
comparison_steps.details: Invoice Bill to: 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC' in Kyrgyzstan. Invoice Sold to: 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC' in Kyrgyzstan. Certificate consignee: 'Technotorg-Don LLC' in Ukraine. These are completely different company names and different countries.

comparison_steps.description: Search in secondary fields (Ship to, Delivery address, Dealer, Importer, etc.)
comparison_steps.details: Ship to: 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC' in Kyrgyzstan. No field in the invoice contains 'Technotorg-Don LLC' or any similar name.
Certificate consignee 'Technotorg-Don LLC' does not appear in any Ship-To field. Rule not applicable.

comparison_steps.description: Full-text search for 'Technotorg-Don' in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.details: Searched all 5 pages of the invoice. The string 'Technotorg-Don' or 'Technotorg' does not appear anywhere in the invoice text.
Certificate consignee country: UKRAINE. Invoice buyer/sold to/ship to country: KYRGYZSTAN. Countries do not match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order – Bill to/Sold to fields checked first
Secondary fields (Ship to, Delivery, Dealer, Importer) checked
MISMATCH determination – consignee not identifiable in invoice

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Technotorg-Don LLC, Heroiv Ukrainy avenue, 113/1, 54025 Mykolaiv, UKRAINE'. Invoice has three buyer/recipient fields, ALL listing 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN'. The company name 'Technotorg-Don LLC' is a completely different entity from 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC'. The country is different: Ukraine vs Kyrgyzstan. Full-text search across all 5 invoice pages finds no occurrence of 'Technotorg' anywhere. This is a clear MISMATCH — different company, different country, no connection identifiable.
consignee.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Technotorg-Don LLC' i Ukraina kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans alla mottagarfält (Bill to, Sold to, Ship to) anger 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC' i Kirgizistan. Företagsnamnet 'Technotorg-Don' förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. Både företagsnamn och land skiljer sig.

goods_description.certificate_value: WATER PUMP, WHEEL BEARING KIT, OTH KIT COMPONENTS, SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH; Article numbers: 439830965-439830972, 439831012-439831014, 439835978
goods_description.invoice_value: NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS; HS codes: 84824000, 84823000, 84825000, 84821090, 39269097, 73151190, 84879090, 73151900, 73181660

comparison_steps.details: Certificate lists article/package numbers: 439830965-439830972, 439831012-439831014, 439835978. Invoice transport package numbers (page 5): 439856569, 439885922, 439885955, 551092288. These are completely different number ranges. The certificate numbers do not appear anywhere in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Controlled text matching of goods description
comparison_steps.details: Certificate goods: 'WATER PUMP, WHEEL BEARING KIT, OTH KIT COMPONENTS, SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH'. Invoice goods: 'NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS'. None of the certificate's identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningar (WATER PUMP, WHEEL BEARING KIT, OTH KIT COMPONENTS, SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH) can be identified in the invoice's goods descriptions. These are entirely different product categories.

comparison_steps.description: Generic description with invoice reference check
comparison_steps.details: Certificate contains specific product descriptions, not a generic description. Also, the invoice reference in the certificate (RB6604204) does not match the invoice number (RB6604864), so even if this were a generic description, the reference would not verify.

rules_applied.description: Article number priority matching – certificate numbers not found in invoice
Controlled text matching – product descriptions entirely different

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes: 'WATER PUMP, WHEEL BEARING KIT, OTH KIT COMPONENTS, SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH'. Invoice describes: 'NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS'. These are completely different product categories. Water pumps, wheel bearing kits, and suspension control arm bushes are automotive aftermarket parts, while the invoice contains industrial bearings, chains, seals, and nuts. No identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning from the certificate can be found in the invoice. Additionally, the article/package numbers in the certificate (439830965-439830972, etc.) do not match any numbers in the invoice (transport packages are different, HS codes are different). Clear MISMATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning ('WATER PUMP, WHEEL BEARING KIT, OTH KIT COMPONENTS, SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH') kan inte identifieras i fakturan, som istället innehåller helt andra produkter (industriella lager, kedjor, tätningar, muttrar). Varken produktbeskrivningar eller artikelnummer överensstämmer.

quantity.certificate_value: GW in KGS 844,96; NW in KGS 714,30; 12 CASE(S)
quantity.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight 171,55 KG; Total Net Weight 125,20 KG; Number of Packages 4

comparison_steps.details: Box 7 contains: GW in KGS 844,96 and NW in KGS 714,30. These are the verifieringsgrundande values.
Certificate GW: 844.96 KG. Invoice Total Gross Weight: 171.55 KG. These values are vastly different (844.96 vs 171.55). Not within any tolerance.
Certificate NW: 714.30 KG. Invoice Total Net Weight: 125.20 KG. These values are vastly different (714.30 vs 125.20). Not within any tolerance.
Certificate indicates '12 CASE(S)'. Invoice indicates 'Number of Packages: 4'. Different number of packages.
No exception can resolve the massive weight discrepancy. Only one invoice is present (3A not applicable). Unit is already KG (3B not applicable). The values simply do not match.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 values identified as verifieringsgrundande: GW 844.96 KGS, NW 714.30 KGS
Förekomstkontroll – neither GW nor NW values match
Uttrycklig motsägelse – both GW and NW explicitly stated in both documents and vastly different
Final quantity determination – values explicitly contradict each other

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: GW 844.96 KGS, NW 714.30 KGS. Certificate box 6: 12 CASE(S). Invoice page 5: Total Gross Weight 171.55 KG, Total Net Weight 125.20 KG, Number of Packages 4. GW comparison: 844.96 vs 171.55 — deviation is ~393%, far exceeding ±0.1% tolerance. NW comparison: 714.30 vs 125.20 — deviation is ~470%, far exceeding tolerance. Package count: 12 vs 4. All three quantity measures show massive, irreconcilable differences. This confirms the certificate and invoice refer to different shipments. MISMATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets vikter (GW 844,96 KG, NW 714,30 KG) och antal kolli (12 CASE) skiljer sig drastiskt från fakturans vikter (GW 171,55 KG, NW 125,20 KG) och antal kolli (4). Avvikelserna överstiger vida toleransgränsen.

country_of_origin.certificate_value: DEU, ESP, ITA, TUR, CHN, TWN
country_of_origin.invoice_value: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States

comparison_steps.details: Invoice uses 'Country of Manufacturing' column on pages 1-2 with per-article country assignments: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States.

comparison_steps.description: Normalize and compare each certificate origin country
comparison_steps.details: Certificate origins (ISO codes): DEU=Germany, ESP=Spain, ITA=Italy, TUR=Turkey, CHN=China, TWN=Taiwan. Invoice origins: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States. Comparison per certificate country: DEU (Germany) → FOUND in invoice. ESP (Spain) → NOT FOUND in invoice. ITA (Italy) → NOT FOUND in invoice. TUR (Turkey) → NOT FOUND in invoice. CHN (China) → FOUND in invoice. TWN (Taiwan) → NOT FOUND in invoice. Four out of six certificate origin countries cannot be identified in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Check for invoice origins not in certificate
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains origins not in certificate: Slovakia, Sweden, France, India, United States. Certificate contains origins not in invoice: Spain, Italy, Turkey, Taiwan. The origin lists are largely incompatible.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice Country of Manufacturing column
Normalization – ISO codes matched to full country names
Positive verification required – 4 of 6 certificate origins not found in invoice

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 origins: DEU, ESP, ITA, TUR, CHN, TWN. After normalization: Germany, Spain, Italy, Turkey, China, Taiwan. Invoice Country of Manufacturing: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States. Only Germany and China appear in both documents. Spain (ESP) is NOT in invoice. Italy (ITA) is NOT in invoice. Turkey (TUR) is NOT in invoice. Taiwan (TWN) is NOT in invoice. Per rule 4.5.5, EACH origin country in the certificate must be expressly identifiable in the invoice. Four certificate countries cannot be found → MISMATCH. Additionally, the invoice contains countries (Slovakia, Sweden, France, India, United States) that are not in the certificate, confirming these are different shipments.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsländer (DEU, ESP, ITA, TUR, CHN, TWN) överensstämmer inte med fakturans tillverkningsländer (Slovakien, Sverige, Tyskland, Frankrike, Indien, Kina, USA). Fyra av sex länder i certifikatet (Spanien, Italien, Turkiet, Taiwan) saknas helt i fakturan.

evidence_records.raw_text:
WATER PUMP,WHEEL BEARING KIT,OTH KIT COMPONENTS,
SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH
NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS
Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
Document A identified as certificate file, Document B as invoice file. Certificate extracted from Document A, invoice from Document B.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Invoice reference check – certificate references RB6604204, invoice bears RB6604864
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate references invoice RB6604204 dated 2023-02-28. The attached invoice is RB6604864 dated 2023-03-08. These are different invoice numbers. However, since only one invoice file was provided and the consignor matches, verification proceeds with a critical finding noted. Per rule 8.5.2 strict interpretation, this should be MANUAL_REVIEW because the referenced invoice is not the attached invoice. However, since the sanity check passes on criterion 2 (consignor match) and this is the only invoice available, verification proceeds to reveal the full extent of mismatches.

Criterion 1: FAILED (RB6604204 ≠ RB6604864). Criterion 2: PASSED (SKF Eurotrade AB is invoice issuer). Criterion 3: FAILED (Technotorg-Don LLC not in invoice). At least one criterion (2) is met, so sanity check passes. However, two criteria failed, indicating a likely wrong invoice attachment.
SKF Eurotrade AB found directly as invoice issuer.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority order – primary billing fields
rule_evaluation_log.details: Bill to/Sold to: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, Kyrgyzstan ≠ Technotorg-Don LLC, Ukraine.
Ship to: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, Kyrgyzstan. Technotorg-Don LLC not found anywhere.
Certificate package numbers 439830965-439830972 etc. not found in invoice.
Certificate products (WATER PUMP, WHEEL BEARING KIT, etc.) not found in invoice.
GW 844.96 vs 171.55 KG; NW 714.30 vs 125.20 KG. Vastly different.
Both GW and NW explicitly stated in both documents. Both GW values differ and both NW values differ. Explicit contradiction on both measures.
DEU→Germany, ESP→Spain, ITA→Italy, TUR→Turkey, CHN→China, TWN→Taiwan.
Spain, Italy, Turkey, Taiwan not found in invoice.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate and invoice may refer to the same shipment with minor discrepancies
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The documents show fundamental mismatches across all major dimensions: different consignee (Technotorg-Don LLC vs MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC), different country (Ukraine vs Kyrgyzstan), different invoice number (RB6604204 vs RB6604864), different invoice date (2023-02-28 vs 2023-03-08), completely different product descriptions (automotive parts vs industrial bearings), vastly different weights (844.96 KG vs 171.55 KG GW), and largely different origin countries. This is not a case of minor discrepancies — the certificate and invoice clearly refer to entirely different transactions/shipments.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The article numbers in the certificate (439830965-439830972) might be shipment tracking numbers matching the invoice transport package numbers
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Invoice transport package numbers (page 5) are: 439856569, 439885922, 439885955, 551092288. These do not overlap with the certificate numbers 439830965-439830972, 439831012-439831014, 439835978. Different number ranges.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Perhaps the invoice reference discrepancy (RB6604204 vs RB6604864) is a typo
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Two digits differ (204 vs 864). While both start with RB6604, the difference of 660 in the suffix is not a plausible single-character typo. Moreover, the comprehensive mismatches across all other dimensions (consignee, goods, weight, origins) confirm these are genuinely different documents, not a reference typo.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet och fakturan avser uppenbarligen olika försändelser. Certifikatet refererar till faktura RB6604204 riktad till Technotorg-Don LLC i Ukraina med varor som vattenpumpar och hjullagersats, medan den bifogade fakturan är RB6604864 riktad till MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC i Kirgizistan med industriella lager och kedjor. Mottagare, varor, vikter och ursprungsländer skiljer sig väsentligt.
blocking_findings: Consignee MISMATCH: Certificate 'Technotorg-Don LLC' (Ukraine) vs Invoice 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC' (Kyrgyzstan)
Goods description MISMATCH: Certificate lists automotive parts (water pump, wheel bearing kit, etc.) vs Invoice lists industrial components (bearings, chains, nuts, etc.)
Quantity MISMATCH: Certificate GW 844.96 KG / NW 714.30 KG vs Invoice GW 171.55 KG / NW 125.20 KG
Country of origin MISMATCH: Certificate DEU,ESP,ITA,TUR,CHN,TWN vs Invoice Slovakia,Sweden,Germany,France,India,China,United States — 4 of 6 certificate origins not found in invoice
Invoice reference MISMATCH: Certificate references RB6604204 (2023-02-28) but attached invoice is RB6604864 (2023-03-08)

consistency_check.notes: 4 MISMATCH checkpoints found (consignee, goods, quantity, origin). 1 MATCH (consignor — same issuer SKF Eurotrade AB). comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL is consistent with at least one MISMATCH.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair_summary: Certifikat SEG-23D-788008 (utfärdat 2023-03-06, SKF Eurotrade AB) verifierat mot faktura RB6604864 (utfärdad 2023-03-08, SKF Eurotrade AB). OBS: Certifikatet refererar till en annan faktura (RB6604204) än den som bifogats (RB6604864).

sections.invoice_value: SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden, SWEDEN
sections.rule_applied: Consignor identified directly as invoice issuer. Company name and country match exactly after normalization.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'SKF Eurotrade AB' i Sverige identifieras direkt som fakturautställare med samma namn och land.

sections.certificate_value: Technotorg-Don LLC, Heroiv Ukrainy avenue, 113/1, 54025 Mykolaiv, UKRAINE
sections.invoice_value: Bill to / Sold to / Ship to: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN
sections.rule_applied: Consignee name 'Technotorg-Don LLC' cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. Invoice buyer is a completely different company 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC' in a different country (Kyrgyzstan vs Ukraine).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Technotorg-Don LLC' i Ukraina förekommer inte i fakturan. Fakturans köpare och mottagare är 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC' i Kirgizistan — helt annat företag och land.

sections.certificate_value: WATER PUMP, WHEEL BEARING KIT, OTH KIT COMPONENTS, SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH
sections.invoice_value: NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS
sections.rule_applied: Controlled text matching — none of the certificate's product descriptions can be identified in the invoice. Entirely different product categories.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets varor (vattenpumpar, hjullagersats, styrarmsföring m.fl.) återfinns inte i fakturan som istället listar industriella lager, kedjor, tätningar och muttrar. Helt olika produktsortiment.

sections.certificate_value: GW in KGS 844,96; NW in KGS 714,30; 12 CASE(S)
sections.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight 171,55 KG; Total Net Weight 125,20 KG; Number of Packages 4
sections.rule_applied: Direct comparison — both GW and NW explicitly stated in both documents with vastly different values. Explicit contradiction per rule 4.4.3.1.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt (844,96 KG) och nettovikt (714,30 KG) avviker kraftigt från fakturans vikter (171,55 KG resp. 125,20 KG). Även antal kolli skiljer sig (12 vs 4).

sections.certificate_value: DEU, ESP, ITA, TUR, CHN, TWN
sections.invoice_value: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States
sections.rule_applied: Positive verification required per rule 4.5.5. Four of six certificate origin countries (Spain, Italy, Turkey, Taiwan) cannot be identified in the invoice.
sections.motivation: Av certifikatets sex ursprungsländer (Tyskland, Spanien, Italien, Turkiet, Kina, Taiwan) kan enbart Tyskland och Kina identifieras i fakturan. Spanien, Italien, Turkiet och Taiwan saknas. Fakturan anger i stället Slovakien, Sverige, Frankrike, Indien och USA som inte finns i certifikatet.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Verifieringen visar att certifikatet och den bifogade fakturan avser helt olika försändelser. Certifikatet refererar till faktura RB6604204 till Technotorg-Don LLC i Ukraina, medan den bifogade fakturan är RB6604864 till MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC i Kirgizistan. Fyra av fem kontrollpunkter ger MISMATCH (mottagare, varor, kvantitet, ursprungsland). Enbart avsändaren (SKF Eurotrade AB) matchar då samma företag utfärdat båda fakturorna. Bedömning: NOT_IDENTICAL.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints verified. 4 MISMATCH, 1 MATCH. comparison_result NOT_IDENTICAL is consistent. No confidence below 0.85 threshold issue since result is NOT_IDENTICAL.
